No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is advanced tertiary education in computer science, providing specialized ICT skills for employment, directly aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.4.

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's focus on advanced 5G/6G networks drives technological upgrading and innovation, crucial for economic productivity and decent job creation (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly addresses advanced mobile communication networks, which are fundamental to resilient infrastructure, technological innovation, and ICT access (Targets 9.1, 9.5, 9.c).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: 5G/6G networks are foundational for smart cities, enabling sustainable transport systems and enhancing resilience to disasters, aligning with Targets 11.2 and 11.b.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to responsible consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to climate change mitigation or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine ecosystems or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The '5G Security' topic has a tangential link to building secure digital infrastructure, which can contribute to combating crime and strengthening institutions (Target 16.a).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances knowledge sharing on advanced ICT and promotes its use, contributing to global technology facilitation and capacity building (Targets 17.6, 17.8).
